title: actaea elata var. alpestris
intro: Actaea elata var. alpestris, also known as mountain bugbane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Actaea elata var. alpestris include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Actaea elata var. alpestris can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
